arts.ttl: Arsenal dealt huge setback ahead of crucial Liverpool game
arts.sum: Arsenal have suffered a self-inflicted blow ahead of next week’s important Premier League meeting with Liverpool. William Saliba saw red in the first half of Saturday’s encounter with Bournemouth after bringing down Evanilson as he was bearing down on goal. arts.ttl: BREAKING: William Saliba sent off after VAR check with Arsenal star to miss Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Arsenal defender William Saliba was initially shown a yellow card for a foul on Bournemouth striker Evanilson but the French defender was then sent off after the incident was checked by VAR

arts.ttl: Brighton suffer injury blow ahead of Wolves and Liverpool clashes
arts.sum: Brighton forward Danny Welbeck looks set for a spell on the sidelines after picking up an injury against Newcastle United on Saturday. The former Arsenal and Manchester United player scored the only goal of the game to give the Seagulls victory at St James’ Park. arts.ttl: Arsenal given double injury concern for Liverpool clash as duo miss Bournemouth trip
arts.sum: Arsenal have been handed injury concerns over two senior stars ahead of an Anfield showdown after the pair did not travel with the squad for Saturday's trip to Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Salah, VVD or Trent? Liverpool's 'number one contract priority' revealed
arts.sum: Liverpool have reportedly made extending Virgil van Dijk's contract their top priority, ahead of confirming deals for Mohamed Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold.

arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella admits one person isn't actually in the Chelsea WhatsApp group chat
Team News: Liverpool vs. Chelsea injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Liverpool and Chelsea.

After loans to Reading and Leicester, the 2022 signing is still not a regular for Chelsea and was the subject of transfer speculation in the summer. According to TuttoMercatoWeb, the Italian midfielder's new representatives Epic Sports, whom he joined in the summer, have already fielded several enquiries for the youngster from suitors.
